name: powerapps-canvas-yaml-generator
title: Power Apps Canvas App YAML Generator
shortDescription: A GitHub Copilot skill that generates valid, importable Power Apps Source Code YAML for canvas app screens or components — including layout containers, galleries, status badges, sidebar navigation, and Power Fx formulas following delegation best practices.
longDescription: This skill teaches GitHub Copilot to act as a Power Apps canvas app YAML code generator. It encodes the Power Apps Source Code YAML schema rules, a full enterprise design system (two-column shell, dark navy sidebar, top bar, status badges, table headers, typography scale), Power Fx delegation rules for SharePoint and Dataverse, and naming conventions for all control types. Given a screen name, nav item, data source, and layout requirements, it produces complete YAML ready for import — and documents all column name assumptions so you can align them with your actual data source.
